contracts.role: p31.cognitivePassport/1.1.0 — additive overlay JSON Schema (Draft 7) for the v1.0.0 base. Documents optional identity / cognition / communication / accessibility / stylePreferences / context blocks introduced by WCD-PHOS-2026-01 (bus bar + face). LIVE as of WCD-PHOS C-4: SCHEMA constant in cognitive-passport/index.html and COGNITIVE_PASSPORT_SCHEMA in @p31/shared atomically bumped to 1.1.0; live generator now emits accessibility.{screenComfort, motionPreference, contrastPreference, informationDensity, temperaturePreference} alongside the legacy uiComfort block (backward compatible — every v1.0.0 reader can still read v1.1.0 documents).
verifyHints: verify:cognitive-passport-schema (atomic SCHEMA equality, html ≡ @p31/shared); npm run verify:passport (mirror parity); npm run verify:cognitive-passport-profiles (audience matrix types unbroken). JSON Schema Draft 7 validity is manual today; npm run verify:cognitive-passport-overlay remains planned.

verify:cogpass-reader — structural + behavioral guards (node --check; required public API window.p31CogPass.{get,set,clear,getRole,getDisplayName,onChange}; required events p31:cogpass-{loaded,cleared,error}; screenComfort cascade thresholds 30/10 with gray-rock pin; STORAGE_KEY 'p31-cogpass-v1' matches privacy.html §2f; schema URI 'p31.cognitivePassport/1.1.0' matches constants.cognitivePassport.jsonSchema). Partial-clone-friendly (skips when andromeda missing); strict via P31_VERIFY_COGPASS_READER_STRICT=1. Manual round-trip: load a v1.1.0 document into localStorage 'p31-cogpass-v1' on a page that includes p31-subject-prefs.js + p31-theme-engine.mjs + p31-cogpass-reader.mjs; verify <html> data-* attributes match passport, document.dispatchEvent fires p31:cogpass-loaded once.

contracts.role: Built artifact (NOT hand-edited) — schema p31.phosVoice/1.0.0. Generated from PHOS-VOICE-DRAFT.md §4 by scripts/build-phos-voice-json.mjs. Top-level _meta declares schema/source/generator/slot counts/doctrine. Other top-level keys are pathnames (slots) with shape { _tag, _tagSource?, greeting, hint, fallback, links }. Fetched at runtime by /lib/p31-phos-guide.mjs tryLoadVoiceJson() and merged over baked-in DEFAULT_VOICE via setVoice() — JSON wins for every defined slot, defaults stand for everything else. Deterministic build (no generatedAt timestamp; verify:phos-voice asserts byte-equality with --check). Production URL: https://p31ca.org/lib/p31-phos-voice.json.

Public mirror of p31-constants.json `research` for cross-origin / programmatic consumers. Generated by scripts/apply-constants.mjs alongside the src/data copy. URL: https://p31ca.org/p31-research.json (CORS open for *).
Mirror of p31-constants.json `research` (papers + zenodoSearchUrl) generated by scripts/apply-constants.mjs. Imported by src/pages/research.astro at build time. Not hand-edited.

SHA-256 lock for OPERATOR-VOICE slots in PHOS-VOICE-DRAFT.md §4. Schema p31.phosVoiceLock/1.0.0. Maintained by `npm run verify:phos-voice -- --update-lock`. Any change to an OPERATOR-VOICE slot's content (greeting/hint/fallback/links) without a matching SHA update fails verify:phos-voice — making silent agent rewrites impossible. Bootstrap state: 1 SHA (/welcome, derived from §3.2). When operator promotes a DRAFT-AGENT-SIMULATED slot to OPERATOR-VOICE, run --update-lock and commit the lock alongside the §4 edit so the diff is reviewable.
